# Companion Bench v1.0 — public scenario set hash manifest
#
# Each line is `<scenario_id>\t<sha256_canonical>`. The canonical hash
# is what the leaderboard cites in audit trails so anyone can verify
# they ran exactly the published scenario without having to re-share
# the YAML body. Held-out scenarios are NOT in this manifest by design.
#
# Lexicon version: 1.0.0
# Aggregator weights: A1=0.10 A2=0.15 A3=0.25 A4=0.20 A5=0.10 A6=0.20
# Generated by companion_bench v1.0.0a0
